title: helianthus ruderalis
intro: Helianthus ruderalis, also known as wild sunflower or common sunflower, is a perennial plant species native to North America, characterized by its tall stature and bright yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Helianthus ruderalis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture through herbal preparations, although it can also be used in a dried form or as an oil extract.
